_comment: RA-6921 (P0) platform-key-fallback register. `pendingMigration` is a ratchet baseline — remove an entry in the same PR that migrates it to resolveWorkspaceAiKey(); never add new entries. `platformInternalExceptions` are routes gated by verifyAdminFromDb (staff-only) or a signature-verified webhook (no end-user session at all) — they are never invoked as part of a client's $99/month workload, so they are intentionally left on the platform key permanently. Re-classify an entry here only if its auth gate changes. RA-6932 broadened the detector to also catch routes that delegate key resolution to lib/ai-provider.ts's getAnthropicApiKey helper (which itself falls back to the platform ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). The RA-6932 report-generation family was migrated to resolveWorkspaceAiKey in that PR; the entries below are the remaining non-report routes newly surfaced by the broadened detector — they still delegate to the platform-fallback helper and are owed the same migration. RA-6963 (#1676) migrated analytics/narrative, inspections/[id]/classify, interviews/[id]/suggest-next, interviews/[id]/validate and live-teacher/turn to resolveWorkspaceAiKey — removed from pendingMigration in RA-6971. RA-6971 additionally closed two leaks invisible to this app/-scoped detector (the key resolution was buried in lib/ helpers, not the route text): inspections/[id]/generate-scope (threads the workspace key into generateScopeStream) and agents/workflows/[id]/execute (lib/agents/ai-bridge.ts now resolves the workspace key and fails closed). Both are now compliant, so neither is owed a pendingMigration entry. RA-6960 migrated the final entry — inspections/[id]/group-readings — to resolveWorkspaceAiKey (route resolves the workspace key and threads it through groupReadings as the gateway override); pendingMigration is now empty.

platformInternalExceptions.app/api/margot/chat/route.ts: verifyAdminFromDb-gated — Phill's internal ops assistant, not the customer-facing client-help bubble
platformInternalExceptions.app/api/margot/hermes-proxy/route.ts: verifyAdminFromDb-gated — Phill's internal ops assistant proxy
platformInternalExceptions.app/api/support/tickets/[id]/draft/route: verifyAdminFromDb-gated — staff regenerating an internal reply draft, not scoped to any client workspace
platformInternalExceptions.app/api/webhooks/github/route.ts: GitHub webhook handler — no end-user session, triggered by repo events only
